---
title: "Recap & Sendoff"
subtitle: "Safe & Maintainable AI Apps in Python"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, theme.scss]
    slide-number: c/t
    width: 1280
    height: 720
    incremental: false
    transition: fade
    code-line-numbers: false
---

## What we built today {.center}

| | Section | Key idea |
|:-:|---|---|
| 🧭 | **Foundations** | Focus LLMs on strengths, engineer around the rest |
| ![](images/chatlas.png){height="45px"} | **chatlas** | One API for any LLM — chat, tools, streaming |
| 🔧 | **Tools & agents** | Real capabilities, with guardrails |
| 📦 | **Structured data** | Typed data from text, images, and PDFs |
| ![](images/shinychat.svg){height="45px"} | **shinychat** | 5 lines to a chatbot with tool displays |
| ![](images/querychat.png){height="45px"} | **querychat** | Self-service analytics, safe by architecture |
| 🧪 | **Evals & observability** | Know if it works, and watch it in production |

: {tbl-colwidths="[10,25,65]"}

::: notes
Callback to the "what we'll build today" slide from the welcome deck. Walk
through each row and remind them of the key takeaway. The arc: from "how to
think about LLMs" to "a deployed analytics app" in 4 hours.
:::

## The core concepts {.center}

::: {style="font-size: 1.5em; line-height: 2;"}

1. Focus LLMs on **language → code**
2. Give them **tools** and **context**
3. Keep **humans in the loop**

:::

* Can get a long way with just context engineering + tools + transparency.
  * You probably don't need RAG, multi-agent, fine-tuning, etc.

## One more thing: beyond chat {background-color="#0F3B5D"}

Today's examples were mostly **chat** based — but `chatlas` is really broader than that.

::: fragment
Chat is a great default UI for LLMs, but not the only one:

1. [Invoice data extractor](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-structured-data.html#populating-inputs)
2. [Workout generator](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/workout-plan/)
3. [Other examples](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-stream.html)
:::

## Where to go from here {.center}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="33%"}

### 📚 Docs

- [chatlas](https://posit-dev.github.io/chatlas/)
- [shinychat](https://posit-dev.github.io/shinychat/py/)
- [querychat](https://posit-dev.github.io/querychat/py/)
- [Shiny GenAI guide](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-chatbots.html)

:::
::: {.column width="33%"}

### 💬 Community

- GitHub Issues on each repo
- [Posit Community Forum](https://forum.posit.co/)
- Discord / Shiny community

:::
::: {.column width="34%"}

### 💪 Free tools

- **Posit AI trial** (no credit card)
- Deploy to **Connect Cloud**

:::
:::

## Thank you! 🎉 {background-color="#0e3b5c"}

::: hcenter
![](images/website-qr.svg){height="350px"}

### [bit.ly/scipy26](https://bit.ly/scipy26)

::: {style="color: white; font-size: 0.9em;"}
Carson Sievert · Posit
:::
:::
